offense_profile.label: Aggressive Shot-Taker
offense_profile.strategic_intent: Push high-risk pass answers into passive coverage shells before pressure counters arrive.
expected_behavior: quick_game plus play_action_flood >= 20 calls across seed pack
offense_profile.notes: Name retained from the plan; the live graph exposes shot tolerance, but the winning aggregate signature is aggressive quick and play-action passing rather than frequent vertical_shot calls.

expected_behavior: aggressive defense risk >= 6 calls across seed pack
redzone_bracket plus bear_front >= 26 calls across seed pack
